title: SupportRecord
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 11.3. Owned by initiative-service (epd2_initiative_service.domain.SupportRecord). additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing identity-separation control (INV-01/INV-03, mirroring participation-credential.schema.json's own pattern): account_id, person_id, and identity_record_id are all forbidden and cannot appear on an instance that validates against this schema - a SupportRecord may only ever carry the opaque support_actor_reference/credential_reference references, never a direct account/person/identity-record link (epd2_initiative_service.domain.FORBIDDEN_FIELD_NAMES).
